children.title: `update_meta(ref, path, value)` — single path-based writer (replace at path; empty path replaces whole meta)
`add(title, meta?)` — accept optional meta at creation
`get(ref, meta=True)` — dedicated single-item lookup, meta on by default
`find_by_meta(path, pattern?)` — path-based; presence if no pattern, regex match if pattern provided
Usage docs: `meta` field, namespace convention (`vendor:purpose`, avoid dots), `update_meta` + `find_by_meta` path usage
Architecture docs: meta field — namespace convention (`vendor:purpose`), dot-path notation, presence vs pattern modes
README: refresh tools list as a table (name, description, new/changed marker)
Development docs: note pinned CLI version, confirm `make install` handles it, upgrade path
